title: More Lapis Lazuli
description: Adds some new decorative blocks made with lapis lazuli and an extremely fast toolset that can instant mine deepslate with haste 2 and efficiency 5, with a low durability for balance.
body:
# More Lapis Lazuli
Adds some new decorative blocks made with lapis lazuli!

As of version 1.2, the mod also adds a few structures made from lapis related blocks; two tree variants and a hut.
As of version 1.3, the frequency of the mod's structures has been reduced and limited to snowy biomes.

Content added by the mod:


![Lapis Hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3n8DlVfJ/images/0127b04707ca2cfde7c1789e97e94a72a998e682_350.webp)  ![Lapis Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3n8DlVfJ/images/c7bd90b5d12b46e03f5f8e91fb58fcda950c00aa_350.webp)

![Lapis-coated amethyst, Crystaline lapis, Crystaline lapis tools.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3n8DlVfJ/images/cb3e41320c2ba96de50fc53b1cc3445219006e8e.jpeg)![Lapis decorative blocks Smooth lapis bricks, lapis planks, lapis log and leaves, lapis bricks and lamps.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3n8DlVfJ/images/3ac338acd5342575988f104cef9d838ba76afdfa.jpeg)![Lapis bricks et al Lapis brick, bricks, lamps, shroomlights.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3n8DlVfJ/images/34a703a28122811504644fd0530014f110deda3e.jpeg)
